verdict_reasoning: IZUMO4 is annotated as nuclear-resident with no TM domain, GPI anchor, or membrane-anchoring mechanism. Unlike IZUMO1/2/3 which are sperm-surface or membrane-associated proteins, IZUMO4 lacks a canonical surface-anchoring feature and is placed in the nucleus by Alliance of Genome Resources. No documented cancer ecto-display, cell-death-induced surfacing, or developmental surface pool is established for this family member. No therapeutic surface-targeting program is known for IZUMO4. Nuclear localization with no membrane-anchoring mechanism is the dominant biology.
